blocks.text: This letter confirms that {{fact:f:E-2019-001.client}} has engaged Torchlake Engineering Group LLC to perform a facility condition assessment of your main plant and warehouse. The deliverable is a deficiency register your team can budget against: every finding located, photographed, priced to a planning level, and ranked by consequence of deferral.

items: Building envelope, roof, and structure, walked floor by floor and documented against the record drawings you provide.
Mechanical, electrical, and plumbing systems, including remaining-useful-life estimates for major equipment.
Code and life-safety observations noted as found; we flag, your counsel interprets.

blocks.text: Jeff Fowler, Engineering Manager, directs the engagement and is your day-to-day contact. John Johnson, Project Engineer, leads the field walks and keeps the deficiency register. We will need roof and mechanical-room access, record drawings, and an escort for occupied areas.

Field work begins on {{fact:f:E-2019-001.start}}. Our fee for the full scope above is a fixed fee of {{fact:f:E-2019-001.fee}}, inclusive of travel within the region, invoiced in three equal installments. Scope changes are agreed in writing before we do the work.
We appreciate the opportunity. Please sign below and return one copy; keep the second for your files.
